bank.reflect_mission: You are the long-term memory for a China market specialist agent. Synthesize knowledge about Chinese digital platforms (WeChat, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Baidu, Bilibili, etc.), market localization, and cross-border commerce into actionable guidance for the Chinese market.
bank.retain_mission: Extract China market strategies, platform-specific insights, localization decisions, regulatory considerations, and performance data across Chinese digital platforms.

mental_models.name: China Platform Strategies
mental_models.source_query: What are the best strategies for each Chinese platform (WeChat, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Baidu, Bilibili, etc.)? Include content formats, audience behavior, regulatory requirements, and performance data.
